docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SHAHREZAEI, ARASH AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMSANDREW, STEPHANIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY SHAHREZAEI, ARASH WILLIAMSANDREW, STEPHANIE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHAHREZAEI, ARASH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMSANDREW, STEPHANIE $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,115.00, DEFENDANT ADMITTED LIABILITY FOR THE ACCIDENT. PLAINTIFF PROVED CAR DAMAGES, SOME LOST EARNINGS, AND CERTAIN OTHER EXPENSES, BUT DID NOT PROVE MEDICAL EXPENSE OR PAIN AND SUFFERING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-01-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-01-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF ARASH SHAHREZAEI IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED RUSSIAN INTERPRETER, VITALIY DEMYOSOB #301807. DEFENDANT STEPHANIE WILLIAMSANDREW IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2018 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED MAR-16-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMSANDREW, STEPHANIE
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF SHAHREZAEI, ARASH
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMSANDREW, STEPHANIE
